commit_message:
Feat/forwarding unit Feat/forwarding unit This pull request introduces two new hardware modules and their corresponding testbench for stack pointer and forwarding logic, enhancing the processor pipeline's hazard management and stack operation capabilities. The most significant changes are the implementation of a forwarding unit for data hazard resolution, a stack pointer unit for stack operations, and a comprehensive testbench to validate stack pointer functionality.

### Pipeline Hazard Manag

examples.commit_message:
Feat/forwarding unit Feat/forwarding unit This pull request introduces two new hardware modules and their corresponding testbench for stack pointer and forwarding logic, enhancing the processor pipeline's hazard management and stack operation capabilities. The most significant changes are the implementation of a forwarding unit for data hazard resolution, a stack pointer unit for stack operations, and a comprehensive testbench to validate stack pointer functionality.

### Pipeline Hazard Manag
examples.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,45 @@
+library ieee;
+use ieee.std_logic_1164.all;
+use ieee.numeric_std.all;
+
+entity forwarding_unit is
+  port (
+    -- Inputs
+    rs1_ex      : in  std_logic_vector(4 downto 0);  -- Source register 1 in EX stage
+    rs2_ex      : in  std_logic_vector(4 downto 0);  -- Source register 2 in EX stage
+    rd_mem      : in  std_logic_vector(4 downto 0);  -- Destination register in MEM stage
+    rd_wb       : in  std_logic_vector(4 downto 0);  -- Destination register in WB stage
+    reg_write_mem : in  std_logic;                    -- RegWrite signal from MEM stage
+    reg_write_wb  : in  std_logic;                    -- RegWrite signal from WB stage
+
+    -- Outputs
+    forward_a   : out std_logic_vector(1 downto 0);  -- Forwarding control for source A
+    forward_b   : out std_logic_vector(1 downto 0)   -- Forwarding control for source B
+  );
+end entity forwarding_unit;
+
+architecture behavioral of forwarding_unit is
+begin
+
+  process(rs1_ex, rs2_ex, rd_mem, rd_wb, reg_write_mem, reg_write_wb)
+  begin
+    -- Default: No forwarding
+    forward_a <= "00";
+    forward_b <= "00";
+
+    -- Check for forwarding to source A
+    if (reg_write_mem = '1') and (rd_mem /= "00000") and (rd_mem = rs1_ex) then
+      forward_a <= "10";  -- Forward from MEM stage
+    elsif (reg_write_wb = '1') and (rd_wb /= "00000") and (rd_wb = rs1_ex) then
+      forward_a <= "01";  -- Forward from WB stage
+    end if;
+
+    -- Check for forwarding to source B
+    if (reg_write_mem = '1') and (rd_mem /= "00000") and (rd_mem = rs2_ex) then
+      forward_b <= "10";  -- Forward from MEM stage
+    elsif (reg_write_wb = '1') and (rd_wb /= "00000") and (rd_wb = rs2_ex) then
+      forward_b <= "01";  -- Forward from WB stage
+    end if;
+  end process;
+
+end architecture behavioral;
\ No newline at end of file
